privileged_info_summary: Verified facts: The scenario used is the real-world Bologna Pasubio dataset. The first bus stop defined in pasubio_bus_stops.add.xml is 'busStop#1' located on the edge '2[1][1][1]b'. Analysis of the bus routes in pasubio_busses.rou.xml reveals that '2[1][1][1]b' is strictly the final edge for all routes that traverse it. Consequently, there is no immediately following downstream edge on its route. This makes the task instruction to 'find the immediately following edge' and 'relocate this first bus stop to the new downstream edge' logically impossible to satisfy. The verifier will always fail the agent as the set of valid next edges is empty. The baseline average trip duration for buses is approximately 568.54 seconds.
